question: Design first Ramsey/T2star scout on accepted r03 after weak-pi pODMR supports 3.876 GHz.

inputs.lab_prior_guardrail: NV_RESEARCH_KNOWLEDGE Shot Budget And Data Quality 2026-05-11 Ramsey FFT sampling guardrail

protocol_inspection.xml_active_path: full_experiment=0: readout1 true mS=0 reference, then ramsey(PSeq,...tau,det,...), then readout2 Ramsey signal
protocol_inspection.ramsey_function_behavior: second pi/2 phase is det*tau*360 after a free wait tau; one-dimensional tau scan is a clean T2star/Ramsey scan
protocol_inspection.readout_roles: readout1 reference, readout2 Ramsey signal when full_experiment=0

bool_vars.note: present but inactive when full_experiment=0; preserve typed boolean path

model.expected_ramsey_raw_oscillation_scale_kc: order 2-6 kcps; bounded by weak-pODMR contrast and ms=0/+1 PL contrast, with unknown T2star envelope
model.resolvability_reason: 51 points over 8 us give 125 kHz FFT bin spacing and 3.125 MHz Nyquist, covering a 2 MHz programmed Ramsey carrier plus the ~0.385 MHz 13C Larmor sideband and +/-0.5 MHz residual center uncertainty. 4x50000 shots matches the weak-pODMR 200k-shot scout quality; weak-pODMR SEM implies a few-kcps Ramsey oscillation should be visible if present.

planned_measurement.analysis_plan: Raw/readout-aware Ramsey review first; this 6 us scout can support a finite T2star if the decay is visible, or motivate a longer follow-up if coherence remains at the end. FFT bin spacing is 166.7 kHz, enough for a first 13C sideband check around 0.385 MHz separation.

decision: Preview advisory and, if queue/lifecycle/verifier gates pass and tracking window is under current advisory cap, execute this as the first bounded Ramsey/T2star scout on r03.

advisory_revision.reason: Reduce scan points/span so the advisory tracking window can fall below cap while preserving enough Nyquist margin for det + 13C sideband + pODMR center uncertainty.
